properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v2 v2 v3 v3 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: /: The atmosphere is changing now For the Spirit of the Lord is here The evidence is all around That the Spirit of the Lord is here :/

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Overflow in this place Fill our hearts with Your love Your love surrounds us You're the reason we came To encounter Your love Your love surrounds us

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: /: Spirit of God fall fresh on us We need Your presence Your kingdom come Your will be done Here as in heaven :/

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: /: A miracle can happen now For the Spirit of the Lord is here The evidence is all around That the Spirit of the Lord is here :/
